assessment.note: She cannot connect mentoring to advancement because she does not know what would influence the next decision, which is a strong growth blockage and mild engagement drag; also reveals a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Current direction
new_queue.name: What kind of growth are you actually looking for next?
new_queue.description: Moves from general ambition to the specific shape of growth she wants now.

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make space for that growth?
new_queue.description: Forces a real investment conversation about time, focus, and priorities.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Where do you want to focus first before we talk again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment and turns the conversation into an action.
